testcase.name: test_signup_grom_without_parent_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_signup.py:71: in test_signup_grom_without_parent_fails assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 500 == 400 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_signup_destination

failure.message:
AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"(sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.Error) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions.InvalidTextRepresentationError'>: invalid input value for enum roleenum: "DESTINATION"
[SQL: INSERT INTO profiles (id, user_id, email, full_name, role, subscription_tier, credit_balance, parent_id, bio, avatar_url, is_verified, is_live, is_private, is_approved_pro, location, company_name, portfolio_url, instagram_url, website_url, hourly_rate, session_price, accepts_donations, skill_level, stance, home_break, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1::VARCHAR, $2::VARCHAR, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::roleenum, $6::VARCHAR, $7::FLOAT, $8::VARCHAR, $9::VARCHAR, $10::VARCHAR, $11::BOOLEAN, $12::BOOLEAN, $13::BOOLEAN, $14::BOOLEAN, $15::VARCHAR, $16::VARCHAR, $17::VARCHAR, $18::VARCHAR, $19::VARCHAR, $20::FLOAT, $21::FLOAT, $22::BOOLEAN, $23::VARCHAR, $24::VARCHAR, $25::VARCHAR, $26::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, $27::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE)]
[parameters: ('bc571dd3-ad7c-4e3e-b559-61d5d34a9035', 'e6b010cc-bcc8-4a74-bca3-0d84d0d55930', 'TEST_ff082154@example.com', 'Test Destination Owner', 'DESTINATION', 'business', 0.0, None, None, None, False, False, False, False, None, 'Test Surf Destination', None, None, None, None, 25.0, False, None, None, None, datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14, 5, 18, 49, 289749, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14, 5, 18, 49, 289753, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc))]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/dbapi)"}
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_auth_signup.py:256: in test_signup_destination assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"(sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.Error) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions.InvalidTextRepresentationError'>: invalid input value for enum roleenum: "DESTINATION"
[SQL: INSERT INTO profiles (id, user_id, email, full_name, role, subscription_tier, credit_balance, parent_id, bio, avatar_url, is_verified, is_live, is_private, is_approved_pro, location, company_name, portfolio_url, instagram_url, website_url, hourly_rate, session_price, accepts_donations, skill_level, stance, home_break, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1::VARCHAR, $2::VARCHAR, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::roleenum, $6::VARCHAR, $7::FLOAT, $8::VARCHAR, $9::VARCHAR, $10::VARCHAR, $11::BOOLEAN, $12::BOOLEAN, $13::BOOLEAN, $14::BOOLEAN, $15::VARCHAR, $16::VARCHAR, $17::VARCHAR, $18::VARCHAR, $19::VARCHAR, $20::FLOAT, $21::FLOAT, $22::BOOLEAN, $23::VARCHAR, $24::VARCHAR, $25::VARCHAR, $26::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, $27::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE)]
[parameters: ('bc571dd3-ad7c-4e3e-b559-61d5d34a9035', 'e6b010cc-bcc8-4a74-bca3-0d84d0d55930', 'TEST_ff082154@example.com', 'Test Destination Owner', 'DESTINATION', 'business', 0.0, None, None, None, False, False, False, False, None, 'Test Surf Destination', None, None, None, None, 25.0, False, None, None, None, datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14, 5, 18, 49, 289749, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14, 5, 18, 49, 289753, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc))]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/dbapi)"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_duplicate_email_fails
